title: senecio lewallei
intro: Senecio lewallei, also known as Lewalle's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its leaves which contain alkaloids such as pyrrolizidine alkaloids, that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio lewallei include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Senecio lewallei can be found in teas, infusions, or tinctures, but caution is advised due to its potential toxicity, especially when consumed in large quantities or for extended periods.
